description: A square graphic on a pale gray background with a faint agency-seal watermark. Dark blue text in the upper portion reads Green cards and visas will be revoked if an alien breaks the law, with the word revoked in bold. Below are overlapping specimen images of a United States Permanent Resident card and an immigrant visa page, both stamped diagonally with a large red REVOKED.
notable_text: Green cards and visas will be revoked if an alien breaks the law; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA PERMANENT RESIDENT; REVOKED
